warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
5 Hindu Push Ups
10m bear Crawls
10 x Inch Worms
10 Cossack Squats

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 10 mins
6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks
8 T2B
10 Dumbbell Snatches 22.5/15kg

gymnastics:
EMOM X 4
Beat Swing x 10
- think Knuckles over the bar
Bigger Beat swing - Push down on bar!!
Floor Arch Turn Over
Low bar transition from box
- False grip + Long arms. -move box away to make it harder
Banded BMU OR BMU
T2B Bar Progression
1-2 mins False Grip on bar - focus on Knuckles Up
EMOM x 3
10 x Beat Swing
EMOM x 3
Jump Into Hollow/Arch x 10
EMOM x 3
Bigger Beat Swing - Push Down on Bar
- Put Ball between feet - Reach Long in the Arch - Dont bend the knees
EMOM x 3
Knees to Chest - Aggressive & Pop - pause
EMOM x 6
Beat Swing with Straight legs - to target
Aim for height without losing tension.
Toes-To-Bar: 2 sets - record biggest unbroken set

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today heavily taxes shoulders, core, and hip flexors via HSW, T2B, and gymnastics skills. Build pressing strength and horizontal pulling.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: . Gymnastics: Toes-To-Bar: 2 sets - record biggest unbroken set. Metcon: AMRAP 10 minutes: 6m Handstand Walk OR 2 Wall Walks, 8 T2B, 10 Dumbbell Snatches 22.5/15kg. For hypertrophy, focus on chest, back (horizontal pull), triceps.
